alternatives: Alternative A — one-line description and why it was rejected.
Alternative B — one-line description and why it was rejected.
assumptions: Assumption that holds for this decision to remain valid.
consequences: List what becomes easier, what becomes harder, and what follow-up work this decision creates.
context: Describe the forces at play: business goals, system constraints, prior decisions this one interacts with, and why a choice must be made now.
decision: State the chosen option in one or two sentences, plus the concrete shape of the decision (components, interfaces, policies).
risks: Risk statement — what could go wrong and the early signal.
title: Use Kubernetes for GenAI-based System
